# EchoTrader Dashboard

EchoTrader is a reflexive market mirror agent. This dashboard surfaces live perception signals, agent reasoning, risk gate status, execution logs, and portfolio posture.

## Pages

https://echotrader.app/ — Main agent dashboard with market mirror view, live Fear & Greed, divergence score, agent thought panel, recent echoes, and TWAK execution log. Read this for current agent thesis and trade posture.

## Backend API

The dashboard consumes a Python FastAPI service at /api/status. Run the agent API separately from the Next.js frontend.
